commands.review_summary:
The PR updates diagnostic stuck-session recovery for `noop/no_active_work`, adds regression coverage and changelog entries, changes usage-cost `models.json` lookup to honor active/default agent dirs, and rewires OpenGrep workflows to download the release asset directly.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main can return `noop/no_active_work` from the real stuck-session recovery path, but the coordinator only applies state changes for `aborted` or `released`, so the queued diagnostic state is left stale.
commands.review_followup: Security-labeled external PR needs maintainer/security review, contributor proof for the pricing behavior, and investigation of the failing test-types check before any repair or merge path.
